_diagnostics.method: static-DD SI scalar projection (T=-1e-4 regulated t->0); real LoopTools C0i/D0i PV
_diagnostics.note: f_N is the rigorous t-channel mediator-triangle (real C0i PV), matched to all quarks via the Higgs-portal sigma-term + 2/27 gluon. The box/penguin (alpha_up_box) is quark-level large but nucleon-level suppressed (gluon/twist-2 hk-floor); NOT folded into f_N. See handoff.

_provenance: REAL — produced by scripts/run_eval.wls on the CORRECTED SM-like ZHMIX benchmark (amp_reduced.m) via Wolfram Engine 14.3 + FormCalc 9.10 + LoopTools 2.16 MathLink (Tier-3 smoke, 2026-06-28). The 125 GeV h is SM-like under SARAH's up<->col2/down<->col1 convention (xi_V=xi_u=xi_d=1.0). f_p/f_n are the rigorously-computed t-channel mediator-triangle (real C0i PV) matched to all quarks via the Higgs-portal sigma-term + 2/27 gluon; UV-pole- and scale-independent (uv_pole_residue=0). C_hchi=-7.57e-4 matches the analytic EW triangle-anchor (-5.41e-4) to ~40% (ratio ~1.40, inside its x3-5 band); the excess of sigma over the analytic triangle-anchor is the rigorously-computed triangle ITSELF plus the heavy-H CP-even contribution — NO box folded. The pseudoscalar-quark box is NOT folded into f_N: it routes through the suppressed gluon/twist-2 channel and is ZH-independent (the quark-level alpha_up_box is large but nucleon-suppressed). Folding the box later is explicit provisional future work (<=1.7x upward if folded). This frozen copy stubs the Wolfram subprocess in Tier-1/2 tests.
